hooks.command: BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then git pull origin main --ff-only 2>/dev/null || true; NEWBRANCH="feature/$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"; git checkout -b "$NEWBRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Pulled latest main and auto-created branch $NEWBRANCH.\"}"; fi
